/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ForwardRenderer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ForwardRenderer.dir/src/app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ForwardRenderer.dir/src/app/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ForwardRenderer.dir/src/core/Renderer.cpp.o -o ForwardRenderer  libglad.a /home/bax/Desktop/opengl/external/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /home/bax/Desktop/opengl/external/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
